items.title_en: Europe could run out of jet fuel in 6 weeks, IEA chief tells AP
items.title_zh: IEA负责人告诉美联社，欧洲可能在六周内耗尽航空燃油
items.desc_en: The International Energy Agency's head warned Thursday that Europe is going to run out of jet fuel in as soon as six weeks.
items.desc_zh: 国际能源署署长周四警告称，欧洲的航空燃油将在最快六周内耗尽。

items.title_en: FanDuel's parent stock is under pressure. Citi doesn't see a recovery anytime soon
items.title_zh: FanDuel的母股面临压力。花旗短期内不会看到复苏
items.desc_en: FanDuel has seen weakening customer engagement on its platform, while it isn't clear its prediction market can drive upside to its owner's stock, per Citi.
items.desc_zh: 据花旗银行称，FanDuel 的平台上的客户参与度正在减弱，但目前尚不清楚其预测市场能否推动其所有者的股票上涨。

items.title_en: Sens. Warren and Blumenthal investigate NLRB decision to drop charges against SpaceX for retaliatory firings
items.title_zh: 参议员沃伦和布卢门撒尔正在调查 NLRB 决定撤销对 SpaceX 报复性解雇的指控
items.desc_en: Sens. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., and Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., are investigating the NLRB after it dropped charges against Elon Musk's SpaceX in February over retaliatory firings.
items.desc_zh: 马萨诸塞州民主党参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 和康涅狄格州民主党参议员理查德·布卢门撒尔 (Richard Blumenthal) 正在对 NLRB 进行调查，此前 NLRB 在 2 月份撤销了对埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 报复性解雇指控。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: PepsiCo, Taiwan Semiconductor, Voyager Technologies, PPG & more

items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Why foreign automakers dominate the sedan market
items.title_zh: 外资车企为何主导轿车市场
items.desc_en: SUVs may have taken over America, but high prices and oversaturation are pushing some customers — and automakers — back to sedans.

items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.desc_en: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.desc_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title_en: Amazon sellers boycott ads in policy change revolt: 'We're running out of f---ing margin'
items.title_zh: 亚马逊卖家抵制广告，抗议政策改变：“我们的利润快用完了”
items.desc_en: Hundreds of large Amazon sellers are boycotting its advertising platform on Wednesday to protest the policy changes.
items.desc_zh: 周三，数百名亚马逊大型卖家抵制其广告平台，以抗议政策变化。

items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀

items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Great at gaming? US air traffic control wants you to apply
items.title_zh: 擅长游戏？美国空中交通管制中心希望您申请

items.desc_zh: 一项新的政府广告活动正试图说服游戏玩家申请航空安全职位。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演

items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.desc_zh: 针对狗的电视频道正在增加，但关于狗是否观看电视的研究却褒贬不一。
